title: One Board runs into error with column_values and MirrorValue
excerpt: I’m adding MirrorValue to my boards preparing for v2023-10. It works for all my boards except for one. When I use this board it throws the error “Internal server error”. What should I do to debug this? It’s only 1 board …

posts.author: Meneghini (Meneghini)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m adding MirrorValue to my boards preparing for v2023-10. It works for all my boards except for one. When I use this board it throws the error “Internal server error”. What should I do to debug this? It’s only 1 board and when I change out the Board ID, it works.
query {boards (ids:2851913446){items_page (limit: 200) {cursor items {name id column_values {id text … on MirrorValue {display_value}}}}}}

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
There are some issues with mirrorvalue and getting many items, and sometimes even a small number. There were also performance issues.

report it to appsupport@monday.com.

There are several other threads open on this issue it seems:

Slow API response with MirrorValue monday Apps & Developers
Hi, as a developer of Monday.com integrations, we are experiencing significant performance issues in using the 2023-10 API with specific regards to Mirror item display values. Below is an example of a typical query we might run within our integrations, which is followed by the next_items_page query to fetch the remaining items. query getItems($columnIds: [String!]) { boards(ids: []) { items_page(limit: 100) { cursor items { id name column_values(ids: $columnIds) { id type text value …

@joseph.monday just a heads up/fyi
